message:
feat: implement service managers, stats, blame, and tune CLI commands

- Add SystemdServiceManager and LaunchdServiceManager in daemon/service.rs
  with full unit file/plist generation, install/uninstall/status lifecycle
- Wire up `sbh install --systemd/--launchd` and `sbh uninstall` in cli_app.rs
- Implement `sbh stats` command with time-window aggregation, top patterns,
  top deletions, and pressure history views (Human + JSON output)
- Implement `sbh blame` command for agent/process disk usage attribution
  via /proc scanning with orphaned artifact detection
- Implement `sbh tune` command with auto-tuning recommendation engine
  that analyzes ballast utilization, pressure oscillation, deletion failure
  rates, and generates actionable config change suggestions with --apply
- Update LinuxPlatform::service_manager() to use SystemdServiceManager
- 14 CLI tests, 26 service manager tests, all passing

Closes: bd-26g, bd-3i3, bd-p2u, bd-395, bd-7vl

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
